summary: The implementation successfully delivers all 9 requirements for CreatorVerse AI PRO. All core features are implemented: AI chat with pattern matching, title generator with emotional hooks, script generator with structured format, SEO score checker, tags generator, hashtag generator, voice generator with 5 styles using browser SpeechSynthesis API, canvas-based thumbnail generator, and dark theme design. The implementation is complete and matches all acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: Authentication system with Internet Identity integration (useInternetIdentity hook, InternetIdentityProvider, AuthClient)
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly excludes user authentication in non-goals: 'User authentication or multi-user support'. The diff includes hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts and auth-related infrastructure that was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend actor integration with QueryClient and actor hooks
hallucinated_features.reason: All requirements specify frontend-only implementation working entirely client-side. The useActor hook and QueryClient setup for backend communication were not requested.
No requirement specified a footer or external attribution link to caffeine.ai. This appears to be promotional content not requested in the BuildRequest.
